author: Anakintano
name: SP8192 + 3-Layer Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.5 + SGD-TTT + LoRA-TTT (Future Work)
val_bpb_note: Pending official 3-seed eval. Single dev run (seed=42) reached 1.0857 sliding window. TTT eval not completed due to exhausted RunPod Quick Start Grant ($25). Expected ~1.082-1.084 with base SGD-TTT.
technique_summary: SP8192 + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence (L3-5, x2) + Parallel Residuals (L7+) + QK-Gain 5.5 + Recur-Alpha + EMA 0.9965 + SGD-TTT (3ep, cosine LR) + LoRA-TTT (65K params, 12ep, try/except fallback) + GPTQ int6/int8 SDClip + Brotli
novel_contributions: LoRA-TTT: freeze base model, adapt rank-4 attn Q/V + rank-2 MLP gate per chunk (65K vs 30M params), 12 epochs/chunk
Recur-Alpha: learned scalar per recurrent block (init=0) carrying first-visit activations to second pass

compliance.three_seeds_note: Single seed dev run only — compute grant exhausted. Official OpenAI eval will provide 3-seed results.
